  "findings": [
    "Missing bushing on RMC where required"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Do not proceed with conduit installation. Obtain and install an approved insulating or metallic bushing on the RMC termination before pulling conductors."
  ],
  "rationale": "RMC terminations must be provided with bushings to protect conductor insulation from abrasion, per NEC 344.46. Beginning work without them is non-compliant and creates a high risk of insulation damage and short circuits.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 344.46"
  ]
